courses.title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp

instructor.name: John Doe
instructor.about: John has over 10 years of experience in web technologies. He has helped thousands of students transition into tech careers at top silicon valley companies.

details.long_description: The most comprehensive web development course on the market. From HTML to React and Node, this bootcamp covers everything you need to become a job-ready developer.

courses.description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch.

courses.title: Advanced JavaScript Mastery

instructor.name: Sarah Smith
instructor.about: Sarah specializes in core JavaScript engine optimization. She is a frequent speaker at JSConf and a contributor to open-source frameworks.

details.long_description: Go beyond the basics. Understand closures, prototypes, async/await, and design patterns that differentiate senior developers from juniors.

courses.description: Deep dive into modern JavaScript concepts and patterns.

courses.title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals

instructor.name: Emily Johnson
instructor.about: Emily is a passionate designer with experience at Airbnb. She focuses on user-centric design and accessibility in modern interfaces.

details.long_description: Learn how to design digital products that users love. This course covers the entire design process from wireframing to high-fidelity prototyping.

courses.description: Learn the basics of user interface and user experience design.

courses.title: React.js Complete Guide

instructor.name: Michael Brown
instructor.about: Michael has been using React since its release. He specializes in building scalable frontend architectures for high-traffic applications.

details.long_description: Master the most popular frontend library. This course covers Hooks, Context API, Redux, and React Router in depth.

courses.description: Build modern web apps using React and hooks.

courses.title: Digital Marketing Basics

instructor.name: David Wilson
instructor.about: David has managed multimillion-dollar marketing budgets for global brands. He simplifies complex marketing strategies for beginners.

details.long_description: Kickstart your career in marketing. Learn the fundamentals of SEO, SEM, social media marketing, and content strategy.

courses.description: Understand SEO, social media, and online marketing strategies.

courses.title: Python for Beginners

instructor.name: Sophia Lee
instructor.about: Sophia is an expert in data science and automation. She loves teaching Python because of its simplicity and power in solving real-world problems.

details.long_description: The easiest way to start your coding journey. Python is used in web dev, data science, and AI. This course covers all the essentials.

courses.description: Start coding in Python with hands-on examples.

courses.title: Data Science with Python

instructor.name: James Anderson
instructor.about: James has a PhD in Statistics and years of experience in predictive modeling. He makes complex data concepts easy to grasp.

details.long_description: Unlock insights from data. Learn NumPy, Pandas, and Matplotlib to analyze and visualize complex datasets effectively.

courses.description: Learn data analysis, visualization, and machine learning.

instructor.name: Olivia Martin
instructor.about: Olivia is a Figma power-user. She has designed interfaces for several successful startups and loves teaching design systems.

details.long_description: Master Figma for UI/UX design. Learn how to create components, auto-layout, and interactive prototypes for web and mobile.

courses.title: Node.js Backend Development

instructor.name: Daniel Garcia
instructor.about: Daniel specializes in building high-performance APIs and microservices. He is an expert in Express, NestJS, and SQL/NoSQL databases.

details.long_description: Build the engine behind the web. This course teaches you how to create robust, secure, and scalable backend services with Node.js.

courses.description: Build scalable backend applications using Node.js.

courses.title: SEO Mastery Course

instructor.name: Chris Evans
instructor.about: Chris has helped websites grow their organic traffic by 500%+. He knows exactly what search engines are looking for in 2024.

details.long_description: Master search engine optimization. Learn technical SEO, keyword research, and backlink strategies to rank on the first page of Google.

courses.description: Improve website ranking with SEO techniques.

courses.title: Machine Learning A-Z

instructor.name: Andrew Clark
instructor.about: Andrew is at the forefront of AI. He has experience building recommendation engines and computer vision models for tech giants.

details.long_description: Master machine learning from A to Z. Learn about regression, classification, clustering, and deep learning using Scikit-Learn and TensorFlow.

courses.description: Master machine learning algorithms and real-world projects.

courses.title: Freelancing & Career Guide

instructor.name: Anna White
instructor.about: Anna has been a top-rated freelancer for 7 years. She now coaches professionals on how to leave the 9-5 and build a sustainable freelance career.

details.long_description: Learn how to start freelancing, find high-paying clients, and build a successful career in the gig economy. Covers profile setup, marketing, and business management.

courses.description: Learn how to start freelancing and build your career.
